docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY KOBELT MICHEAL ANDRE AS TO DEFENDANT HITZ JACQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
